events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, England.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the incomparable Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music. And the first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, becoming the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis' iconic debut album dropped 32 years ago today. What's your favourite track from the record?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in music history, passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon. His influence on music is eternal.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The one with *that* zebra crossing! The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released 57 years ago. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, lead singer of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972, in Manchester, England.

angles.name: Mad Fer It
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem he sang?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' in 1971
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, in the US.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine all the people living life in peace...' John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released 55 years ago. Still as powerful as ever.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: The first Apple iPod was unveiled on October 23, 2001, and released on November 10, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple revolutionised portable music with the launch of the first iPod. A true game-changer!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme song? Let us know!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England.

angles.name: Legendary Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have turned 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy legend.
